text: I couldn't sleep worrying about how I've been feeling lately.
label: non-infectious

text: I know it's likely nothing but I haven't felt right and it's worrying me.
label: migraine/discharge

text: I have a bad productive cough — bringing up yellowish phlegm — and it hurts to breathe deeply. 3 day(s) like this.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I'm probably fine, but I've been feeling off and wanted to be sure.
label: non-infectious

text: I think I'm coming down with something — bit of a fever, muscle aches, dry cough, 3 day(s) now.
label: influenza/mild

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 5 day(s) in.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Dangerously high fever, severe muscle pain, utterly exhausted. This has been 8 day(s), and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. I'm burning up.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 3 day(s).
label: influenza/mild

text: Worsening chest cough with thick mucus, feverish, and quite short of breath. 9 day(s), though it seems to be slowly resolving.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I think I'm coming down with something — bit of a fever, muscle aches, dry cough, 8 day(s) now.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I can't breathe properly. Severe chest pain, coughing up greenish phlegm, high temperature. 8 day(s) and scared, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Just a touch of flu I think — mild fever, a bit of tiredness, dry throat. 8 day(s), though I think I'm slowly getting better. I have a very high fever.
label: influenza/mild

text: Worsening chest cough with thick mucus, feverish, and quite short of breath. 5 day(s), and I'm getting worse, not better.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Persistent cough with mucus and mild chest discomfort. Started 10 day(s) ago, not getting better, not getting worse.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: I have a chesty cough with a bit of phlegm and some tightness in my chest. 4 day(s) now, and I feel more unwell than yesterday. I'm struggling to breathe.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I've had a vague sense of fatigue, thought I'd get it checked out.
label: non-infectious

text: I'm struggling badly to breathe — every breath hurts, coughing up thick dark mucus, high fever. 7 day(s) of this, and I'm really worried because it's getting worse. I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: High fever, bad body aches, shivering, exhausted. Classic flu, but quite rough — 3 day(s), and I'm really worried because it's getting worse. I'm a bit short of breath.
label: influenza/mild

text: Gasping with each breath, sharp chest pain, high fever, thick productive cough. 9 day(s) now, though I think I'm slowly getting better. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I've been a bit tired and anxious about it, wanted to get checked.
label: migraine/discharge

text: Gasping with each breath, sharp chest pain, high fever, thick productive cough. 9 day(s) now, though I think I'm slowly getting better. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I can barely move — high fever, shaking chills, splitting headache, bad cough. 15 day(s) like this, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: I have a bad productive cough — bringing up yellowish phlegm — and it hurts to breathe deeply. 6 day(s) like this, and I feel more unwell than yesterday. I'm burning up.

text: High fever, bad body aches, shivering, exhausted. Classic flu, but quite rough — 21 day(s), and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.

text: Fever on and off, drenched in sweat, can't get out of bed. This has gone on 8 day(s), and it feels like it might be turning a corner. I'm burning up.
